calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRANDON TANG, TEL. NO. (510) 896-9411 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
CLAYTON SMITH, TEL. NO. (510) 478-3523, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLAYTON SMITH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is denied. Even if the court concludes that several of plaintiff's proffered business records are hearsay and do not meet the requirements of Evidence Code sec. 1271 [business records exception to hearsay rule], defendant still fails to maintain its burden to obtain CCP 473 relief. First, the motion is untimely as to the default. The default was entered on June 4, 2013, which was more than 6 months before defendant filed this motion. (Defendant filed the motion on June 25, 2014). The entry of the default judgment on January 2, 2014, is a separate proceeding. Second, defendant failed to provide a proposed pleading or answer in compliance with CCP 473. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Continued To Aug-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CLAYTON SMITH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to August 27, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/mjm
